zh.lifeSummary: 當John Adams於1502年1月1日出生在英國薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛時，他的父親John Adams30歲，母親Catherine Stebbing18歲。他於1529年與Margery Alice Squire在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年7月8日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛聖 代維達斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Adams于1502年1月1日出生在英国薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛时，他的父亲John Adams30岁，母亲Catherine Stebbing18岁。他于1529年与Margery Alice Squire在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1543年7月8日在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴頓 聖 大衛聖 代維達斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Adams
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Dutch, and German (mainly northwestern Germany): patronymic from the personal name Adam . In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Greek Adamopoulos , Serbian and Croatian Adamović (see Adamovich ), Polish (and Jewish) Adamski .
Irish and Scottish: adopted for McAdam or a Scottish variant of Adam , with excrescent -s.

History: This surname was borne by two early presidents of the US, father and son. They were descended from Henry Adams, who settled in Braintree, MA, in 1635/6, from Barton St. David, Somerset, England. The younger of them, John Quincy Adams (1767–1848) derived his middle name from his maternal grandmother's surname (see   Quincy  ). — Another important New England family, established mainly in NH, is descended from William Adams, who emigrated from Shropshire, England, to Dedham, MA, in 1628. James Hopkins Adams (1812–61), governor of SC, was unconnected with either of these families, his ancestry being Welsh; his forebears entered North America through PA.

variants.name: Adam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Umberto, Aldo, Giulio, Paolo, Primo, Silvio.
German: Latinized (humanistic) patronymic from the personal name Adam , from Adami, the Latin genitive. This surname is also found in France (Lorraine).
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name   Adamo  . This surname is also found in Corsica and southern France.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Adams was born on 1 January 1502, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, his father, John Adams, was 30 and his mother, Catherine Stebbing, was 18. He married Margery Alice Squire in 1529, in Barton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 8 July 1543, in Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in St David's Church, Barton St David, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Margery Alice Squire en 1529, à Barton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1543, à Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à St David's Church, Barton St David, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams è nato il il 1 gennaio 1502 nel Barton St David, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Adams, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Stebbing, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margery Alice Squire nel 1529, nel Barton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 8 luglio 1543, nel Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a St David's Church, Barton St David, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.Barton St David, Somersetshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드
ko.lifeSummary: John Adams(이)가 1502년 1월 1일 영국 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Adams(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Stebbing(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴에서 Margery Alice Squire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바턴 스트 데이비드 스트 데이비드'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Adams nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1502, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Adams, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Stebbing, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Alice Squire em 1529, em Barton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de julho de 1543, em Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em St David's Church, Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Adams родился 1 января 1502 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Adams было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Stebbing, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Alice Squire в 1529 г. в местности бартон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 8 июля 1543 г. в местности бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ст дэвид'с чурч, бартон ст дэвид, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Barton St David, Somerset, England: Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Adams nació el 1 de enero de 1502, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Adams, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Catherine Stebbing, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margery Alice Squire en 1529, en Barton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 8 de julio de 1543, en Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en St David's Church, Barton St David, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
